name: nfoifsb 26.1.2 Building Pack
description: Paper server plugin pack plus optional Fabric client mods for serious Minecraft building.

projects.name: FastAsyncWorldEdit
projects.purpose: High-speed WorldEdit replacement for large selections, brushes, copy/paste, and terrain edits.
projects.notes: Do not install the regular WorldEdit jar beside FAWE unless you intentionally switch back.

projects.name: WorldGuard
projects.purpose: Region protection, build rules, PvP flags, and admin-safe construction zones.

projects.name: Axiom Paper Plugin
projects.purpose: Server-side support for the Axiom builder tool.

projects.name: LitematicaFolia
projects.purpose: Server-side .litematic import and direct paste support for builders.

projects.name: Syncmatica Paper
projects.purpose: Shared schematic placement/sync workflow for team builds.

projects.name: BuildersUtilities
projects.purpose: Small builder conveniences bundled into one Paper plugin.

projects.name: BuildersWand
projects.purpose: Fast repeated block placement for walls, floors, and survival-friendly construction.

projects.name: WorldEditDisplay
projects.purpose: Visualizes WorldEdit selections and edit boundaries for safer building.

projects.name: WorldEditSelectionVisualizer
projects.purpose: Classic WorldEdit selection visualization support.
projects.notes: Optional because WorldEditDisplay covers the same area on newer servers.

projects.name: SchemImporter
projects.purpose: Extra schematic import utility for server-side build workflows.

projects.name: Take It Out
projects.purpose: Shulker picking and easy-place style quality-of-life for build logistics.

projects.name: BlueMap
projects.purpose: High-quality 3D web map for checking builds from the browser.

projects.name: Chunky
projects.purpose: Pregenerates chunks so build areas load smoothly on the Raspberry Pi.

projects.name: ImageFrame
projects.purpose: Image and GIF maps for signs, posters, logos, and build decoration.

projects.name: EasyArmorStands
projects.purpose: Armor stand and display entity editor for detailed scene dressing.

projects.name: StellarProtect
projects.purpose: CoreProtect-style logging and rollback for build accidents and griefing.

projects.name: InventoryRollbackPlus
projects.purpose: Player inventory rollback support for safer admin recovery.

projects.name: LuckPerms
projects.purpose: Permission groups for builder/admin access control.

projects.name: Safe Zone Claims
projects.purpose: Simple protected zones for showcase/build areas.

projects.name: Pl3xMap
projects.purpose: Lightweight 2D web map alternative to BlueMap.
projects.notes: Optional because running BlueMap and Pl3xMap together costs extra disk and CPU.

projects.name: Fabric API
projects.purpose: Required API layer for most Fabric client mods.

projects.name: Axiom
projects.purpose: Professional all-in-one creative building and terrain editing client.

projects.name: WorldEdit CUI
projects.purpose: Client-side WorldEdit selection outlines.

projects.name: MaLiLib
projects.purpose: Required library for Litematica, MiniHUD, and Tweakeroo.

projects.name: Litematica
projects.purpose: Client-side schematic preview, placement, and build planning.

projects.name: MiniHUD
projects.purpose: Light-level, structure, and technical build overlays.

projects.name: Tweakeroo
projects.purpose: Builder quality-of-life toggles and placement helpers.

projects.name: Freecam
projects.purpose: Inspect builds and interiors without moving the player.

projects.name: Sodium
projects.purpose: Client performance boost for large build areas.

projects.name: Iris Shaders
projects.purpose: Shader support for build screenshots and inspection.

projects.name: Continuity
projects.purpose: Connected textures for cleaner build presentation.

excluded.name: CoreProtect
excluded.reason: Latest Modrinth metadata did not advertise 26.1.2 support, so StellarProtect is used instead.

excluded.name: regular WorldEdit jar
excluded.reason: FAWE is installed as the WorldEdit-compatible high-performance replacement to avoid duplicate WorldEdit jars.
